eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Grand Traverse, MI; at 04:27 PM ON MAR 16, 2026 Effective until 07:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Grand Traverse County EM March 16, 2026 705pm
Life-threatening winter storm. 3 ft of snow and 40 mph winds causing impassable roads. Travel is strongly discouraged. If stranded, responders may be delayed. Stay off the roads and shelter in place tonight.
